description: Upgrade plan to migrate PhotoAlbum-Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.reason: Upgrading to Java 21 (latest LTS) and Spring Boot 3.4 ensures the project benefits from the latest long-term support, security patches, performance improvements, and access to modern language features. Spring Boot 3.x requires Spring Framework 6.x and Jakarta EE, replacing the legacy javax.* namespace.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces. Update all dependencies to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4 and Java 21. Ensure build scripts (pom.xml or build.gradle) reflect the new target versions.
